code: @Manual{,   title = {osninterface: Query OpenSky Network State Vectors via DuckDB},   author = {Quinten Goens},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.1.0},   url = {https://euctrl-pru.github.io/osn-interface/}, }

title: osn-interface
text: R package querying OpenSky Network (OSN) state vector data via DuckDB, reading parquet files directly OSN S3-compatible bucket.

title: osn-interface
text: Provide lightweight R functions lazily query OpenSky Network historical state vector data without downloading bulk files. package connects DuckDB directly OSN S3 endpoint (s3.opensky-network.org) using httpfs extension, enabling predicate pushdown lazy evaluation remote parquet files.

title: osn-interface
text: OpenSky also exposes Trino endpoint (trino.opensky-network.org), direct S3 access via DuckDB chosen : - Java dependency (Trino requires RJDBC + JVM) - query timeouts concurrency limits (Trino: 30min timeout, 2 concurrent queries) - Trino uses browser-based external authentication (hard automate); S3 uses simple key/secret - DuckDB provides lazy evaluation filter projection pushdown remote parquet - Simpler dependency chain: just duckdb R package

title: osn-interface
text: S3 Endpoint: s3.opensky-network.org Bucket: ec-datadump File pattern: s3://ec-datadump/YYYY-MM-DD/HH/states_YYYY-MM-DD-HH.parquet (24 hourly files per day, hour subdirectory) Credentials: Environment variables OSN_USERNAME (access key ID) OSN_KEY (secret access key)

title: osn-interface
text: File: reference/airports.csv Lookup key: ident column (ICAO code, e.g., "EHAM", "EGLL") Coordinates: latitude_deg, longitude_deg

title: osn-interface
text: osn_connect() — Create configure DuckDB connection S3/httpfs pointed OSN bucket. Reads credentials env vars. osn_fetch_day(date = Sys.Date() - 1, con = NULL) — Lazily fetch state vectors specific day (default: yesterday, D-1). Returns lazy tbl (dbplyr) can filtered collection. osn_filter_radius(lazy_tbl, lat, lon, radius_nm) — Given lazy table, filter state vectors within radius (Nautical Miles) given coordinates. Uses bounding-box pre-filter + Haversine refinement. osn_airport_coords(ident) — Look airport coordinates reference/airports.csv ICAO identifier. Returns list lat lon. osn_fetch_around_airport(ident, radius_nm, date = Sys.Date() - 1, con = NULL) — Convenience wrapper: fetches day’s data filtered radius around named airport.

title: osn-interface
code: dbExecute(con, "INSTALL httpfs; LOAD httpfs;")   # S3 remote parquet access dbExecute(con, "INSTALL spatial; LOAD spatial;")  # ST_Distance_Sphere (Haversine) dbExecute(con, "SET s3_endpoint='s3.opensky-network.org';") dbExecute(con, "SET s3_url_style='path';") dbExecute(con, "SET s3_access_key_id=<from OSN_USERNAME>;") dbExecute(con, "SET s3_secret_access_key=<from OSN_KEY>;")

title: osn-interface
text: Radius specified Nautical Miles (NM) 1 NM = 1852 m = 1/60 degree latitude Uses bounding-box pre-filter (fast, pushed parquet row-group pruning) ST_Distance_Sphere(ST_Point(lon, lat), ST_Point(ref_lon, ref_lat)) DuckDB’s spatial extension precise Haversine great-circle distance (returns meters) steps run inside DuckDB’s engine via dbplyr lazy evaluation

title: osn-interface
text: osn_fetch_day() returns dbplyr lazy table backed read_parquet() S3 glob data fetched user calls collect(), head(), similar Predicate pushdown: clauses parquet columns skip irrelevant row groups Projection pushdown: selected columns transferred

title: osn-interface
text: duckdb (>= 1.0.0) — database engine + httpfs extension DBI — database interface dplyr — data manipulation dbplyr — lazy table translation SQL

title: osn-interface
text: OSN_USERNAME — OpenSky Network S3 access key ID OSN_KEY — OpenSky Network S3 secret access key

title: osn-interface
text: Standard R package structure (DESCRIPTION, NAMESPACE, roxygen2 docs) Keep functions minimal — unnecessary abstractions SQL generation goes dbplyr possible; raw SQL necessary Include installation instructions README.md

what: Query OpenSky Network State Vectors via DuckDB
title: Query OpenSky Network State Vectors via DuckDB
text: R package lazily querying OpenSky Network historical state vector data via DuckDB. Reads parquet files directly OSN S3 bucket — bulk downloads needed.

title: Query OpenSky Network State Vectors via DuckDB
text: DuckDB’s httpfs extension connects directly OpenSky S3-compatible storage (s3.opensky-network.org) reads parquet files demand. Queries lazy: data transferred call collect(). spatial extension provides native Haversine distance (ST_Distance_Sphere) geographic filtering.

title: Query OpenSky Network State Vectors via DuckDB
text: R >= 4.1.0 OpenSky Network account S3 data access (typically university-affiliated researchers, governmental organisations, aviation authorities)

title: Query OpenSky Network State Vectors via DuckDB
code: library(osninterface) library(dplyr)  # Connect to OpenSky S3 con <- osn_connect()  # Or use the airport lookup shorthand sv_eham <- osn_fetch_around_airport("EHAM", radius_nm = 40, con = con)  # Only now does data actually transfer result <- sv_eham |> collect()  # Always disconnect when done osn_disconnect(con)

what: Filter state vectors to a radius around a point — osn_filter_radius
title: Filter state vectors to a radius around a point — osn_filter_radius
text: Applies fast bounding-box pre-filter (pushed parquet row-group pruning) followed precise Haversine great-circle distance filter using DuckDB's ST_Distance_Sphere().

title: Filter state vectors to a radius around a point — osn_filter_radius
Filter state vectors to a radius around a point — osn_filter_radius
text: .data lazy tbl_dbi lat lon columns (e.g. osn_fetch_day()). lat Centre latitude (decimal degrees, WGS84). lon Centre longitude (decimal degrees, WGS84). radius_nm Radius Nautical Miles.
